title: FUNYKICH 6 x Plastic Bowl Set, 800 ml Cereal Bowls, Salad Bowls, Unbreakable & Reusable & Durable & Microwave Safe & Dishwasher Safe, Camping Bowl with Bag [BPA Free]
features: 【Eco-Friendly & Reusable】The Cereal Bowl is Made of PP Plastic Material, Which is 100% Non-Toxic, Odorless

【Microwave & Dishwasher Safe】Our Microwave Bowls are Safe for Microwave and Dishwasher Use. We Recommend Use the Microwave for No More than 3 minutes at 212°F (100°C). Cleaning is a Breeze Whether You Choose to Use the Dishwasher or Hand Wash

【Lightweight & Sturdy】Our Plastic Bowls is Sturdy and Durable, Will Not Break or Chip Like Porcelain or Ceramic. Lightweight for Kids to Hold Easily and Making Them Convenient to Carry for Outdoor Activities Like Camping

【Multicolor and 24 Oz Capacity】Cereal Bowls Set of 6 in Green, Beige, Pink, Yellow, Blue, Dark Green. Max Capacity: 24 oz. Width: 6 inch(15cm). Weight: 102g. Deep Enough for Cereal, Salad, Fruit, Rice and Noodle without Splashed Out

【Wide Range of Uses】The Breakfast Bowls are Perfect for Parties, Picnics, Camping, Barbecues, Hiking, and Everyday Meals at Home, School and Office. It is Perfect Gift for Family and Friends on Mother's Day, Father's Day, Birthdays, Christmas and New Year
